renames.rationale: 4-instruction thunk holding the literal 'invalid string position' and calling FUN_14002d718 (std::_Xout_of_range/std::_Xran). Classic STL out-of-range helper inlined per TU.
Holds strings 'LogDeinit' and 'logging::CLogDLL::~CLogDLL'; calls GetProcAddress, FreeLibrary, Sleep. Logging-DLL destructor that resolves and calls LogDeinit before unloading.
